creator: c.prevotaux@rural-networks.com
text:
I have the same problem on FreeBSD 9.1-Release using the GENERIC Kernel:

FreeBSD xxx.xxx.xxx 9.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE #0 r243825: Tue Dec  4 09:23:10 UTC 2012     root@farrell.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64


on a HP Pavilion 2460ef (iCore5) which is using the : 

ahci0: <Intel Cougar Point AHCI SATA controller> port 0xf070-0xf077,0xf060-0xf063,0xf050-0xf057,0xf040-0xf043,0xf020-0xf03f mem 0xf7406000-0xf74067ff irq 19 at device 31.2 on pci0
ahci0: AHCI v1.30 with 4 3Gbps ports, Port Multiplier not supported
ahcich0: <AHCI channel> at channel 0 on ahci0
ahcich4: <AHCI channel> at channel 4 on ahci0

pciconf -l:
